name: @wyloc/gateway
description: Local proxy that sits between Claude Code (and other base-URL-configurable CLI/IDE clients) and the Anthropic API, swapping secrets out of prompts before they leave the machine and rehydrating them in the streamed response. Reuses the @wyloc/detector engine.

scripts.test: node --import tsx test-rehydrate-unit.mjs && node test-passthrough.mjs && node test-swap.mjs && node test-roundtrip.mjs && node test-sql-mask.mjs && node test-openai-mask.mjs && node test-code-mask.mjs && node test-file-read-mask.mjs && node --import tsx test-wyloc-config.mjs && node test-wyloc-gateway.mjs && node --import tsx test-wyloc-remote.mjs && node --import tsx test-cli.mjs && node test-responses-mask.mjs && node --import tsx test-responses-rehydrate.mjs && node --import tsx test-mask-cache.mjs && node --import tsx test-env-mask.mjs && node test-env-gateway.mjs && node --import tsx test-parse-once.mjs && node test-gemini-mask.mjs && node --import tsx test-gemini-rehydrate.mjs && node --import tsx test-no-remask.mjs
